description_long: This is a standard manual screwdriver featuring a long, slender, black metal shaft and a green, faceted handle. The handle appears to be made of hard plastic with subtle texturing for grip, and it is shaped with multiple flat surfaces for ergonomic handling. The shaft is straight and uniform in diameter, extending from the handle to a tip that is not clearly visible in these views. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for general-purpose use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or maintenance settings. The object shows no visible branding, markings, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The color contrast between the green handle and black shaft makes it easy to spot among other tools.
description: A green-handled screwdriver with a long, black metal shaft and a faceted plastic grip. The tip is not clearly visible, and the tool appears clean and unmarked.
description_view_0: The screwdriver is seen from the shaft end, showing the full length of the black shaft and the green, faceted handle.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the straight alignment of the shaft and the geometric handle, with no visible tip details.
description_view_2: This view again highlights the full shaft and handle, with consistent proportions and no visible tip features.
description_view_3: The screwdriver is shown from the opposite side, mirroring the previous views with the same handle and shaft details.
